summary_hi: असंगठित मज़दूरों के लिए सरकार-समर्थित पेंशन योजना - 60 साल की उम्र के बाद ₹1,000 से ₹5,000 हर महीने पेंशन।

chunks.text: Atal Pension Yojana (APY) is a government-backed pension scheme administered by PFRDA, focused on workers in the unorganised sector. Subscriber chooses a guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000, ₹2,000, ₹3,000, ₹4,000 or ₹5,000 to begin from age 60. Contributions vary by chosen pension amount and entry age. 60 saal ki umar ke baad har mahine 1000 se 5000 rupaye tak ki pension - asangathit kshetra ke mazdooron ke liye.

APY eligibility: Any Indian citizen aged 18 to 40 with an Aadhaar-linked bank or post-office savings account. Must NOT be an income-tax payer (rule effective 1 October 2022) and must not be covered by any other statutory social-security scheme (EPF, etc.). Patrata: umar 18 se 40 saal ke beech, Bharat ka nagrik, bank ya post-office mein khaata ho aur Aadhaar se juda ho. Income tax dene wale 1 October 2022 ke baad eligible nahin.

APY benefits: (1) Guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000 / ₹2,000 / ₹3,000 / ₹4,000 / ₹5,000 from age 60 for life. (2) On death of the subscriber, same pension continues to the spouse for life. (3) On death of both subscriber and spouse, the accumulated corpus (8.5 lakh to 42.4 lakh approx for ₹1k-5k pensions) is paid to the nominee. (4) Corpus is government-guaranteed. Faayda: 60 saal ke baad pakka pension, subscriber ki maut ke baad pati/patni ko bhi same pension, dono ki maut ke baad nominee ko corpus.

APY contribution depends on entry age and desired pension. Examples for monthly contribution: At age 18, for ₹1,000 pension → ₹42/month; for ₹5,000 pension → ₹210/month. At age 30, for ₹1,000 pension → ₹116/month; for ₹5,000 pension → ₹577/month. At age 40, for ₹1,000 pension → ₹291/month; for ₹5,000 pension → ₹1,454/month. Contributions auto-debited from the subscriber's bank account monthly/quarterly/half-yearly. Yogdaan aapki umar aur pension ke hisaab se badlta hai — 18 saal mein 42 rupaye se shuru, 40 saal mein 291 rupaye se. Bank khaate se apne aap kat ta hai.

Documents for APY: (1) Aadhaar card linked to your savings bank / post-office account. (2) Active bank / post-office savings account (mandatory for auto-debit). (3) Mobile number. No additional paperwork. Kagazaat: Aadhaar card, savings bank ya post office account, mobile number. Aur kuch nahin chahiye.

How to enrol in APY: Visit your bank or post-office branch where you hold a savings account. Fill the APY Subscriber Registration Form (also downloadable). Provide Aadhaar, mobile, and nominee details. Choose desired monthly pension (₹1k-5k). Bank links your account for auto-debit. Many banks now allow online APY enrolment through net-banking / mobile app. PRAN (Permanent Retirement Account Number) is issued. Kaise apply karein: apne bank ya post office shakha mein jayein, APY ka subscriber form bharein, Aadhaar aur nominee details dein, pension amount chunein. Bank apne aap auto-debit lagayega. Kayi bank ab net-banking se bhi enrol karwa dete hain.

APY exit rules: Normal exit on attaining age 60 — start receiving pension. Voluntary exit before 60 is permitted only on death / terminal illness of subscriber — full contribution + actual interest is paid (no government co-contribution). Subscriber can increase or decrease pension amount once a year. 60 saal se pehle paisa nikalna sirf marne ya badi bimari ki halat mein - aur tab bhi sirf jama paisa aur byaaj milta hai. Pension amount saal mein ek baar badla ja sakta hai.

APY helpline: PFRDA toll-free 1800-110-708 / 1800-889-1030. Website: npscra.nsdl.co.in/scheme-details.php. Contact your bank branch for enrolment and statement. Madad ke liye PFRDA helpline 1800-110-708 par call karein, ya apne bank shakha mein jayein.
